channel.title: Microsoft for Developers
channel.description: Get the latest information, insights, and news from Microsoft.

item.title: 【Visual Studio Code 1.117】Visual Studio 代码 1.117
item.description: 【Learn what's new in Visual Studio Code 1.117 (Insiders) Read the full article】了解 Visual Studio Code 1.117 中的新增功能（内部人士） 阅读全文

item.title: 【Forgotten message from the past: LB_INIT­STORAGE】忘记了过去的消息：LB_INITSTORAGE
item.description: 【The classic Win32 list box control lets you preallocate memory in anticipation of adding a large number of items. The documentation recommends doing this for cases where you are adding more than 100 items to a list box.¹ What is being preallocated here? The list box internally tracks the items as an array of structures and a separa】经典的 Win32 列表框控件允许您在预期添加大量项目时预先分配内存。文档建议您在向列表框中添加超过 100 个项目的情况下执行此操作。¹ 这里预分配的是什么？列表框在内部将项目作为结构数组和单独的数组进行跟踪

item.title: 【Best of Both Worlds for Agentic Refactoring: GitHub Copilot + MicroVMs via Docker Sandbox】代理重构的两全其美：GitHub Copilot + 通过 Docker Sandbox 的 MicroVM
item.description: 【Legacy codebases frequently contain hardcoded logic and complex build scripts that depend on specific filesystem structures, making them notoriously difficult to modernize in isolated environments. Docker Sandbox addresses this challenge through a bidirectional workspace】遗留代码库经常包含硬编码逻辑和依赖于特定文件系统结构的复杂构建脚本，这使得它们在隔离环境中很难实现现代化。 Docker Sandbox 通过双向工作空间解决了这一挑战

item.title: 【What's New in Microsoft Foundry Fine-Tuning | April 2026】Microsoft Foundry 微调中的新增功能 | 2026 年 4 月
item.description: 【This month we're shipping three updates that make Reinforcement Fine-Tuning (RFT) more accessible, more powerful, and easier to get right: Global Training for o4-mini — train from 13+ Azure regions at lower per-token rates. New model graders — GPT-4.1, GPT-4.1-mini, and GPT-4.1-nan】本月，我们将发布三个更新，使强化微调 (RFT) 更易于访问、更强大且更容易正确执行： o4-mini 的全球培训 — 以更低的每个代币费率从 13 个以上的 Azure 区域进行培训。新型号平地机 — GPT-4.1、GPT-4.1-mini 和 GPT-4.1-nan

item.title: 【Free Your Terminal with Detached Mode in Aspire 13.2】在 Aspire 13.2 中使用分离模式释放您的终端
item.description: 【Running Aspire apps from the CLI has a friction point: your terminal is locked to the AppHost process. While the app is running, you can't use the terminal to check logs or telemetry. You must open a new terminal window. Worse, if an agent has started your Aspire app to test a feature, the agent may decide to kill the app to free the termin】从 CLI 运行 Aspire 应用程序有一个摩擦点：您的终端被锁定到 AppHost 进程。应用程序运行时，您无法使用终端检查日志或遥测数据。您必须打开一个新的终端窗口。更糟糕的是，如果代理启动了您的 Aspire 应用程序来测试某项功能，代理可能会决定终止该应用程序以释放术语

item.title: 【From AI to .NET: 20 VS Live! Las Vegas Sessions You Can Watch Now】从 AI 到 .NET：20 VS Live！您现在可以观看拉斯维加斯会议
item.description: 【In March 2026, developers came together at VS Live! Las Vegas for a full week of technical learning, hands-on exploration, and a lot of great conversations about where software development is headed next. From AI-assisted development to modern .NET, cloud-native apps, and developer productivity, one thing was】2026 年 3 月，开发者齐聚 VS Live！拉斯维加斯为期一周的技术学习、实践探索以及关于软件开发下一步发展方向的大量精彩对话。从 AI 辅助开发到现代 .NET、云原生应用程序和开发人员生产力，有一件事是

item.title: 【What's up with window message 0x0091? We're getting it with unexpected parameters】窗口消息 0x0091 是怎么回事？我们得到了意想不到的参数
item.description: 【A customer, via their customer liaison, reported quite some time ago that their program stopped working on Windows XP. (I told you it was quite some time ago.) The customer's investigations revealed that the problem occurred because their window was receiving message 0x0091, and the parameters are wrong. Who is sending】一位客户很久以前通过他们的客户联络人报告说，他们的程序在 Windows XP 上停止运行。 （我告诉过你那是很久以前的事了。） 客户调查发现，问题的发生是因为他们的窗口收到了消息0x0091，参数错误。谁发送

item.title: 【Azure MCP tools now ship built into Visual Studio 2022 — no extension required】Azure MCP 工具现已内置于 Visual Studio 2022 中 - 无需扩展
item.description: 【Azure MCP tools now ship built into Visual Studio 2022 — no extension required Azure MCP tools are now built into Visual Studio 2022 as part of the Azure development workload — no separate extension to find, install, or update. You can enable over 230 tools across 45 Azure services directly in GitHub Copilot Chat and m】Azure MCP 工具现已内置于 Visual Studio 2022 中 - 无需扩展 Azure MCP 工具现已内置于 Visual Studio 2022 中，作为 Azure 开发工作负载的一部分 - 无需查找、安装或更新单独的扩展。您可以直接在 GitHub Copilot Chat 和 m 中启用跨 45 个 Azure 服务的 230 多个工具
